title: Implement rule-based technical analysis system with 6-step objective process

requirements.text: Update the external API integration documentation in frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts to specify that the API endpoint must implement a 6-step rule-based technical analysis process: 1) image preprocessing (increase contrast, convert to high sharpness, detect individual candles, identify wick/body/high/low, ignore broker UI elements), 2) candle reading (extract direction up/down, body size, wick size, color sequence, movement strength), 3) trend identification (ascending tops/bottoms = ALTA, descending = BAIXA, sideways = LATERAL), 4) price action pattern detection (engulfing high/low, hammer, shooting star, doji, pullback, breakout, support/resistance - only when rules are confirmed), 5) signal scoring system (+2 points strong trend, +1 favorable pattern, -1 resistance against, -2 contrary pattern; result >= 2 = COMPRA, <= -2 = VENDA, between -1 and 1 = NEUTRO), 6) mandatory return showing trend, detected patterns, total score, confidence percentage, final signal, and brief technical explanation. Add comments describing these requirements for API provider implementation.

quotes: PROCESSO OBRIGATÓRIO: 1) Pré-processamento da imagem: - aumentar contraste - converter para alta nitidez - detectar velas individualmente - identificar pavio, corpo, máxima e mínima - ignorar elementos visuais da corretora
2) Leitura dos candles: Extrair: - direção (alta/baixa) - tamanho do corpo - tamanho do pavio - sequência de cores - força do movimento
3) Identificação da tendência: Regras: - topos e fundos ascendentes = ALTA - topos e fundos descendentes = BAIXA - laterais = LATERAL
4) Detectar padrões de price action: Somente se regras forem confirmadas: - Engolfo de alta/baixa - Martelo - Shooting star - Doji - Pullback - Breakout - Suporte e resistência

5) Cálculo do sinal: Criar pontuação: +2 pontos = tendência forte +1 ponto = padrão favorável -1 ponto = resistência contra -2 pontos = padrão contrário Resultado: >= 2 → COMPRA <= -2 → VENDA entre -1 e 1 → NEUTRO
6) Retorno obrigatório: Mostrar: - Tendência - Padrões detectados - Pontuação total - Confiança (%) - Sinal final - Explicação técnica curta

acceptanceCriteria: apiConfig.ts includes detailed comments documenting the 6-step technical analysis process requirements
Comments specify objective rule-based approach with no subjective interpretation
Documentation includes scoring system rules and signal thresholds
Comments note that unclear cases should return 'SEM ENTRADA' instead of fabricated signals

requirements.text: Update the TypeScript interface definitions in frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts to extend ApiAnalysisResponse with an optional 'pontuacao' (number) field for the total score, ensure 'sinal' accepts 'COMPRA', 'VENDA', 'NEUTRO', and 'SEM ENTRADA' as valid values, and add JSDoc comments explaining the scoring system (+2/-2 point scale) and that 'SEM ENTRADA' indicates no clear trading signal was detected.

quotes: Pontuação total
Sinal final
Nunca inventar sinais se não houver confirmação. Se não houver clareza → retornar 'SEM ENTRADA'.

acceptanceCriteria: ApiAnalysisResponse interface includes optional 'pontuacao?: number' field
The 'sinal' field type accepts 'COMPRA' | 'VENDA' | 'NEUTRO' | 'SEM ENTRADA'
JSDoc comments document the scoring system and signal thresholds
Type definitions align with the 6-step analysis requirements

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts to handle the new 'NEUTRO' and 'SEM ENTRADA' signal values from the API response. Map 'NEUTRO' to a neutral state in the internal AnalysisResult format, map 'SEM ENTRADA' to indicate no entry signal, and ensure the mapping logic preserves the 'pontuacao' field if present in the API response. Add appropriate handling for these cases in the UI mapping logic.

quotes: entre -1 e 1 → NEUTRO
Se não houver clareza → retornar 'SEM ENTRADA'

acceptanceCriteria: mapApiResponse function handles 'NEUTRO' signal mapping to internal format
mapApiResponse function handles 'SEM ENTRADA' signal mapping to internal format
Score field (pontuacao) is preserved if present in API response
Mapping logic does not break existing COMPRA/VENDA handling

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx to display 'NEUTRO' signals with a neutral visual style (gray or yellow indicator), display 'SEM ENTRADA' signals with a warning style and appropriate Portuguese text ('Sem sinal de entrada detectado'), show the total score (pontuacao) if available in the analysis result with a label 'Pontuação:', and ensure all signal types (COMPRA, VENDA, NEUTRO, SEM ENTRADA) have distinct visual indicators and Portuguese labels.

quotes: Pontuação total
Sinal final
Se não houver clareza → retornar 'SEM ENTRADA'

acceptanceCriteria: SignalCard renders NEUTRO signals with neutral styling
SignalCard renders SEM ENTRADA signals with warning styling and Portuguese text
Total score (pontuacao) is displayed when available with 'Pontuação:' label
All four signal types have distinct visual appearances

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to handle and display NEUTRO and SEM ENTRADA signal types. For NEUTRO signals, display appropriate messaging in Portuguese ('Mercado em consolidação - aguarde confirmação'). For SEM ENTRADA signals, display clear messaging in Portuguese ('Nenhum sinal claro detectado - aguarde melhor oportunidade') and consider hiding or disabling the 'Save Analysis' button for SEM ENTRADA results. Ensure the score (pontuacao) is prominently displayed if present.

quotes: entre -1 e 1 → NEUTRO
Nunca inventar sinais se não houver confirmação. Se não houver clareza → retornar 'SEM ENTRADA'

acceptanceCriteria: Results page displays appropriate Portuguese messaging for NEUTRO signals
Results page displays appropriate Portuguese messaging for SEM ENTRADA signals
SEM ENTRADA results have modified UI indicating no actionable signal
Score (pontuacao) is displayed prominently when available

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts to include in the request payload or headers an instruction field specifying the requirement for objective rule-based analysis without subjective interpretation. Add a comment or configuration note explaining that the API must follow the 6-step technical process and never fabricate signals when confirmation is unclear.

quotes: IMPORTANTE: Não fazer interpretação subjetiva da imagem. A análise deve seguir REGRAS TÉCNICAS OBJETIVAS passo a passo.
Nunca inventar sinais se não houver confirmação.

acceptanceCriteria: analysisApi.ts includes configuration or comments documenting objective analysis requirement
Request payload or headers can convey analysis methodology requirements to API
Code includes notes that API should return 'SEM ENTRADA' for unclear cases
Implementation does not break existing API call functionality

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/History.tsx and frontend/src/components/HistoryListItem.tsx to display NEUTRO and SEM ENTRADA signals in the analysis history list with appropriate visual indicators and Portuguese labels. Ensure that NEUTRO signals show as 'Neutro' and SEM ENTRADA signals show as 'Sem entrada' with distinct styling to differentiate them from COMPRA/VENDA signals.

quotes: entre -1 e 1 → NEUTRO
Se não houver clareza → retornar 'SEM ENTRADA'

acceptanceCriteria: History list displays NEUTRO signals with 'Neutro' label and neutral styling
History list displays SEM ENTRADA signals with 'Sem entrada' label and distinct styling
Historical entries for all signal types are clearly distinguishable
List item component handles all four signal types without errors

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo analysis storage logic; it should continue storing externally-generated analysis results
Do not edit immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain single-actor architecture in backend; all Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo
All UI text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil)
Do not implement the actual AI analysis logic in the frontend; only update API integration documentation and response handling
nonGoals: Implementing the actual 6-step image processing and candle analysis algorithm (this is the API provider's responsibility)
Creating a new backend analysis service or Motoko-based analysis logic
Modifying the chart upload or camera capture functionality
Changing the processing animation stages or timing
Adding new settings or configuration options beyond API documentation
Modifying the external API endpoint URLs or provider selection logic
